title: Lunker Recordings
description: Independent record label website. This was an early web project for my dad. He requested a website for his record label, so I built it and used it as practice for my react skills!

title: Wedding Website
description: Wedding website for my partner and I. This is also a solid wedding website template including an rsvp form, registry, time/location info, and image gallery.

title: My Blog
description: My personal blog website, I use Obsidian to write posts, which is setup to auto generate on my site. I write about web dev, personal life, work life, etc.

title: Weird Web October 2025
description: Collection of websites made for a webtober event (inspired by inktober). Showcases many custom javascript techniques and creative ideas for future projects
